items.deck: Over a third of men never wipe after urinating, according to YouGov polling, and men's health specialists say that this can lead to a harmful build up of bacteria.

items.title: 'We don't know whose baby we've had': When IVF goes horrifically wrong - from embryo 'mix-ups' to families left raising children who are not their own
items.deck: In rare and heartbreaking cases, errors can leave parents raising children who are not biologically theirs - or discovering decades later that their family's genetic story isn't what they believed.

items.title: These BTS Fans Waited 15 Hours to See Their Idols
items.deck: Those without tickets arrived at the venue before the sun rose on Saturday to stake out areas that offered unobstructed views of the stage.

items.title: Should I Tell My Employee I Think He Has ADHD?
items.deck: Plus, my co-workers had an affair and misused company funds.

items.title: On Beirut’s Waterfront, Loss Meets Life, and Luxury, Amid War
items.deck: Thousands displaced by Israeli strikes on Lebanon’s capital now shelter along the promenade hugging the Mediterranean Sea.

items.title: How the Supreme Court Could Change Voting by Mail
items.deck: The Supreme Court is ruling on whether ballots received after Election Day should be disqualified.
